triples.subject: Sales of EVs in the US
triples.object: from nearly 65,000 vehicles sold in 2017 to more than 800,000 vehicles in 2022
triples.sentence: Since 2016, sales of EVs in the US have grown – from nearly 65,000 vehicles sold in 2017, to more than 800,000 vehicles in 2022.

triples.subject: EV sales
triples.sentence: Data from auto analytics firm Motor Intelligence showed EV sales rose 51% in the first half of 2023, following the upwards trend.

triples.subject: The average electric car in 2022
triples.sentence: The average electric car in 2022 cost more than $60,000 (£48,784).

triples.subject: The average Tesla owner in 2022
triples.sentence: the average Tesla owner according to Market Research firm Hedges & Company, had a household income near $150,000 (£121,200) in 2022.
